name: BHG Group AB (publ)
summary: BHG Group AB (publ) operates as a consumer e-commerce company in Sweden, Finland, Denmark, Norway, and rest of Europe. It operates in two segments, Do-It-Yourself (DIY) and Home Furnishing. The company offers a range of brands totalling approximately 1,000,000 products within DIY, leisure, furniture, and furnishings. It operates approximately 100 online sites comprising bygghemma.se, trademax.se, chilli.se, nordicnest.se, and furniturebox.se, as well as approximately 70 showrooms. The company was formerly known as Bygghemma Group First AB (publ) and changed its name to BHG Group AB (publ) in May 2020. BHG Group AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
